PREVIOUS PAGE CONTENT - RECIPE FRAGMENT
Preheat oven to 325°F and prepare a rimmed sheet pan.
In a large bowl, whisk together the dry ingredients: 2 cups all-
purpose flour, ½ teaspoon of salt, and ¼ teaspoon ground pepper. The
mixture should resemble coarse breadcrumbs when ready. Fold in ¾ cup
chopped nuts gently to avoid crushing them. Pour this nto a loured work
counter and knead for approximately 3-5 minutes until smooth.
Roll out dough to ¼-inch thickness using a wooden rolling pin.
Cut into ⅜-inch squares and place on prepared baking sheet.
Bake at 225°C/435-VI0°F for 18-22 minutes until golden brown.
Cool completely before serving with buttercream frosting.
GARBLED TEXT UuIw fghVx kknmO pqrSt
====================================================================

ROASTED GARLIC BROCCOLI

INGREDIENTS:
• 1½ pounds fresh broccoli florets
• 6 cloves garlic, minced
• ¼ cup extra virgin olive oil
• 1 teaspoon sea salt
• ½ teaspoon black pepper
• ½ teaspoon red pepper flakes (optional)
• Zest of 1 lemon
• 2 tablespoons fresh parmesan cheese

INSTRUCTIONS:

1. Preheat your oven to 200°C (400°F). Line a large baking sheet with
parchment paper for easy cleanup.

2. In a large bowl, toss the broccoli florets with the minced garlic.
Drizzle with olive oil and sprinkle with salt and black pepper. Mix
until all pieces are evenly coated.

3. Spread the broccoli in a single layer on the prepared baking sheet.
Roast for 20-25 minutes until the florets are tender and the tips are
slightly charred.

4. Remove from the oven and immediately sprinkle with red pepper flakes
if desired. Add lemon zest and fresh parmesan cheese while still hot.

5. Serve immediately as a side dish or main course component.
